properties.Observation: A protected area located on the left bank of the Kotmale Reservoir. In a protected area owned by the Mahaweli Authority
properties.Description:
Marking boundaries

Vegetative cover improving around the reservation with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid interval

Contingenci

properties.Scheme: 4 canals stars from the Katugolla Lake
properties.Observation: The soil between the Katugolla spill canal and the concrete road has been washed away and needs to be restored.
properties.Description: Construction of 3.0m high 1:3:6 (40mm) cement concrete Retaining Wall

properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
